## Meeting Purpose

[Explore AI-driven growth strategies and potential collaboration between Laravel and fwd.digital.](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) has rapidly grown to $2M ARR in 5 months, focusing on AI-powered content and workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [fwd.digital's approach: start with services, understand job-to-be-done, then build technology (workflows before tools)](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Laravel is in early stages of implementing AI and automation, with Trey exploring options before committing to specific tools](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Potential for collaboration on custom AI workflow development, possibly without immediate need for tools like Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds and Recent Developments

  - [Trey recently joined Laravel (week 2) after 4 years at Rissell](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Laravel has been profitable, reaching $9M annual revenue, but investing in cloud infrastructure this year](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
  - [fwd.digital has grown rapidly, signing 20 customers including Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### AI Workflow Automation Strategies

  - [fwd.digital's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - [Focus on "jobs to be done" in go-to-market processes](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Build complex workflows (200+ steps) for tasks like content generation](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
      - [Integrate various data sources (call transcripts, CRM data, web scraping) for comprehensive insights](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Examples of automated workflows:](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [Follow-up email generation after calls](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
      - [Call analysis for new product feature interest](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [Detailed call summaries with multiple data points (use case, deal structure, sentiment)](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [Support ticket response generation with relevant resource links](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Future of RevOps and AI Integration

  - [Trey's hypothesis: AI growth engineers could potentially replace traditional CRM systems like Salesforce](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Marcel agrees, noting the potential for motivated companies to build custom solutions](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Challenges include finding flexible UI platforms that can handle large datasets](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [fwd.digital offers co-building opportunities for companies like Laravel](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Possibility of starting with fwd.digital's instance before moving to Laravel's own setup](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Emphasis on learning patterns to develop reusable practices](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send meeting recording for reference](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting next week or soon after](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Trey to consider potential areas for collaboration or custom workflow development](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Explore possibilities of working together without immediately investing in specific tools like Salesforce or Arops](https://fathom.video/share/bjMDeUbbiAym5tw3GrdNtrzUHo4bWsRy?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
